languages.intro: वे भाषाएँ चुनें जिन्हें आप एक्सप्लोर करना चाहते हैं। हर एक को एक रंग और झंडा मिलता है जिसे आप अनुकूलित कर सकते हैं।

languages.lastLanguageGuard: आपको कम से कम एक भाषा चाहिए। इसे हटाने से पहले कोई और जोड़ें।

onboarding.howItWorksSubtitle: Each idiom reveals its meaning, equivalents across languages, and full origin — all in one card
onboarding.cardFeedSubtitle: Swipe the card to see the same expression in another language
onboarding.exploreSubtitle: Search by expression, filter by language or category
onboarding.surpriseMeDesc: Tap the dice for a random idiom from our collection
onboarding.idiomMeaning: To relieve tension or awkwardness in a social situation
onboarding.idiomExampleSentence: He told a joke to break the ice at the meeting.
onboarding.idiomOriginText: From the practice of sending ships to break river ice so trade vessels could pass — opening the way became 'warming up' any situation.
onboarding.statsTitle: The world's idioms, in your pocket
onboarding.statsSubtitle: A growing library of expressions across 11 languages

onboarding.benefit4: Discover the same idiom across 11 languages
